policy.browserEvidence: preview-only and never eligible for Mentor, rewards, reputation, scholarships, instructor assessment or official challenge completion
policy.legacyMigrationRule: legacy browser records may be displayed only on explicitly quarantined historical surfaces and may never be promoted to durable truth
policy.communityConsent: default-private, revisioned and transactionally evidenced under canonical tenant/workspace/principal context
policy.sharedJournals: same-tenant privacy-minimized projection of canonical Arena reflections only; pseudonymous aliases use internal tenant/principal seeds; free text is bounded, identifier-redacted and fail-closed for secrets, explicit signals, guaranteed returns and recruitment; no demo, localStorage, exact PnL or internal identity fields

canonicalAuthorities.purpose: tenant/principal-bound default-private schema and database invariants
PostgreSQL-only self/public reads and transaction-coupled consent mutation over canonical Academy cartax identity/progress fields
strict-session profile reads, revisioned consent mutation and tenant-context-bound shared-journal read view
server-only same-tenant pseudonymous and safety-filtered projection from canonical Trading Arena reflections gated by evidenced account consent
strict runtime parsing and secure idempotency identity for the Community journal UI

legacyModules.reason: localStorage state, browser-generated IDs/timestamps/slippage/PnL and scenario completion
browser-owned journal records remain referenced only by historical preview components; Community journals and official Arena journal do not import or promote them
legacy component types are retained temporarily without localStorage, durable consent, canonical hydration or official evidence authority
contains scoring primitives only; browser collection is disabled and callers must supply verified server-derived signals
must not personalize Mentor from browser persistence

consumers.allowedAuthority: hydrated server progress and behavioral snapshot only
self-view of server behavioral snapshot; instructor sharing remains disabled until a separate role/grant authority
challenge catalogue preview; no official completion or score
navigation and ephemeral profile setup only; no browser persistence or consent authority

same-tenant pseudonymous, identifier-redacted and safety-filtered canonical Arena reflection projection plus revisioned Community consent; consent controls remain available if Feed loading alone fails
not mounted by primary Arena route
not mounted by production scenario route
PostgreSQL Community profile authority only; no runtime DDL, filesystem fallback or simulator_snapshot
